name: Greaves Mobility — EV Customer Support Squad
description: Inbound call handler for Greaves Mobility EV: routes to service/complaint handling, sales/test ride inquiry, or call closure

agents.name: hello
agents.description: Naina greets caller, collects name, vehicle registration, mobile number, and routes to the right specialist

agents.name: service
agents.description: EV service booking, complaint registration, battery/charger support, and escalation. Hands off to sales for purchase queries.

agents.name: sales
agents.description: New EV purchase inquiry, test ride booking, financing/EMI, and subsidy info. Hands off to service for existing vehicle issues.

agents.name: closer
agents.description: Confirms service/booking details, collects feedback rating, provides interaction summary, and ends call warmly.
